name: git
description: Git operations governed by Factory conventions

message.description: Must begin with artifact ID prefix. Examples: 'FN-GATE-1: implement atom coverage check', 'META: add factory-meta skill'

paths.description: Explicit file paths to stage. No `git add -A`.

preconditions: working tree is clean of unrelated changes
tests pass for the files being committed
lineage audit passes for any spec/ changes
branch has commits ahead of base
push.warning: Push to main/production/release is permanently blocked. Open a PR instead.

preconditions: all coverage gates applicable to the PR's changes pass
PR body cites the Function ID / Gate / META task it implements
PR body cites a Function / Gate / META task

force_push.warning: force_push is permanently blocked. Use merge-commit strategies.
